title: Feature: hex dev remaining fixes — free model chain, grade normalization, scaffold path, file paths
description: Fix the 5 remaining issues preventing hex dev from completing a full end-to-end pipeline with free models and correct quality grading.

phases.name: Inference Resilience
phases.description: Free model fallback chain with proper backoff

phases.name: Code Generation Fixes
phases.description: Scaffold path and file path inference

steps.description: Implement full fallback chain in retry logic. When paid model returns 402, try each model in fallback_chain_for() sequentially with 10s backoff between attempts. If all fail, log the full chain and continue. Currently only tries one free model then gives up.

Fix grade score normalization. hex analyze returns raw scores like 8700 but the grade calc expects 0-100. Normalize: if score > 100, divide by 100. Apply in validate_phase.rs run_quality_gate() and run_quality_loop().

Rebuild hex-nexus release binary with the GET /api/analyze endpoint (already implemented in analysis.rs but only in debug build). Verify the endpoint returns JSON with score/grade/violations when called against a target directory.

Fix scaffold not generating in headless mode. The headless code phase calls execute_all() but scaffold generation is in execute_all_in(). Wire execute_all_in() into the headless path, passing output_dir and language from DevConfig.

Improve file path inference for code steps. When workplan steps don't have a files[] array, infer the path from the step description and adapter: domain steps → src/core/domain/<slug>.ts, port steps → src/core/ports/<slug>.ts, adapter steps → src/adapters/<type>/<slug>.ts, usecase steps → src/core/usecases/<slug>.ts.
